title: So why didnt the 10th Angel go God Mode
display_title: So why didnt the 10th Angel go God Mode
wikitext:
[]: So why didn't the 10th Angel go God Mode?             Quote Post by Leliel » Wed Nov 20, 2013 8:39 pm Hey all, this is gonna be my first post on here. I'm really surprised "leliel" wasn't taken by the way. Anyway, so I was watching 2.22 for like the 15th time, and I remembered that when an Eva takes in an S2 it becomes "godlike". Like in the original- Unit-01 takes in S2, now has infinite energy. So when a Fruit of Knowledge entity takes in a fruit of life, it goes god. But why doesn't it work the other way around? Zeruel literally ate pretty much the entire Unit-00, pilot and all. That's like- 2 fruits of knowledge. Made me think that maybe- since an angel already has infinite energy that the knowledge would just give it the ability to know exactly what to do and how to do it, crushing anything in it's way- because with knowledge it can now utilize its powers to the maximum.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Nov 20, 2013 9:23 pm Unit-00 doesn't have an S2 engine. It runs off of power cables, just like all the other plebeian Evangelions.

[]:             Quote Post by Leliel » Wed Nov 20, 2013 9:38 pm Nah, I was saying that: S2= Fruit of Life Brain?(something on a human) = Fruit of Knowledge So how come when Zeruel eats Unit-00, nothing happens? The flow chart with unit-01 went like Unit-01[Knowledge] + S2[Life] -> A true "godlike" being. So why not Zeruel[Life] + Unit-00[Knowledge] -> A true "godlike" being?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 20, 2013 9:57 pm "Nothing happened" after Eva-01 eating Zeruel in the show, either, besides Ritsuko giving a dramatic speech and Yui roaring at the Moon. No Impact shenanigans or anything. Assuming (and that's assuming a lot) that the mechanics are kind of similar for the films, why would the reverse situation be any different?

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Wed Nov 20, 2013 10:23 pm I wouldn't say that nothing happened, Zeruel did went Giant White Naked Rei Boobed Zeruel after all...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 20, 2013 10:27 pm K40s wrote: I wouldn't say that nothing happened, Zeruel did went Giant White Naked Rei Boobed Zeruel after all...

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Nov 20, 2013 10:30 pm Because fanservice, that's why. @OP: This would lead to an interesting discussion on what form the Fruit of Knowledge takes in humans, since I'm pretty sure that the Angels have some form of brain. Perhaps that's worth creating a thread on.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 20, 2013 10:44 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Because fanservice, that's why.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu Nov 21, 2013 12:34 am Reichu wrote: If memory serves, it had more to do with paying homage to female sentai villains or something. Might be in the Tsurumaki 2.0 CRC interview? (Of course, neither this nor the almighty name of fanservice provide an in-universe justification.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 21, 2013 1:51 am Rei IV wrote: Ayanamization

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Nov 21, 2013 4:10 am Reichu wrote: One of Asari's concepts goes with a much more Eva-like humanoid body, which in-universe would have made more sense. Oh, well.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 21, 2013 7:10 am The "god mode" component of the topic title is kind of misleading, since in-universe "god mode" is actually pseudo-evolution, which is something that Evas do when they revert back into their original radiant Adams forms, or... something. How can this idea be applied to Angels? I have no idea. ElMariachi wrote: IIRC the CRC interview, they were initially going for the Eva-like body, but Anno himself requested to change it into a giant deformed female body.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Nov 21, 2013 7:29 am I suppose that by "God Mode" the OP means "starting an Impact", which is what's would ahppen if an Angel reaches Lilith. --- Armisael only briefly merged with EVA-01, and not completely, or maybe that kind of mechanism don't apply to NGE. That bit was just musing from my part, I don't have any proof that a Rebuild Angel fusing/devouring 01 would trigger an Impact if she's made from Lilith(if that's the case, that makes you wonder who got the retarded idea to create an Evangelion from Lilith and send it fighting Angels at close-quarter!) But if 01 is made from Lilith and fusing with an Angel does trigger an Impact, that might give us more insights on what happened during N3I, especially how EVA-01 could pseudo-evolve and trigger an Impact, and why SEELE is so hellbent on using special Evas made from ADAM for HIP. --- I said "hive mind" because that's the fist thing that popped in my mind, some way to collect informations and sort of psychically sharing it with their brethren could be more accurate, I still can't believe that Zeruel taking the "form" of EVA-00 was pure coincidence.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu Nov 21, 2013 12:42 pm I mean seriously, how anyone on their right mind could find that sexy

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Nov 21, 2013 12:49 pm ElMariachi wrote: I mean seriously, how anyone on their right mind could find that sexy : [wkimg]File:Eva2-22 C1751 a crop.jpg[/wkimg] It's like a 80 meter tall naked Slenderman with boobs for God's sake!

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Nov 21, 2013 12:54 pm Yeah, I'm certainly running with hawt. Taking the question seriously, perhaps the Fruit of Knowledge lies in a HUMAN soul. Since Zeruel didn't consume any human souls- and keep in mind, eating a soul is NOT how you take it into yourself- perhaps that would be the reason for the lack of "god mode".

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu Nov 21, 2013 1:07 pm I honestly would've prefer if THAT concept went into the movie. You can still have clothing on and still be sexy as you would buck-naked. I like it looks like a cross between an Eva Unit's armor, as well as teh Rei's plug suit.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 21, 2013 1:44 pm Impacts in both NGE and NTE are more complicated than some matter-antimatter reaction. However, with NTE, the combination of missing information AND multiple new Impact-relevant elements (multiple Adams, Spear of Cassius, Shinji as "trigger") makes it basically impossible to meaningfully speculate at this time, especially via some simple transposition of NGE's (very nebulous) mechanics. Rei IV wrote: I like it looks like a cross between an Eva Unit's armor, as well as teh Rei's plug suit.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Thu Nov 21, 2013 2:05 pm The markings on the body are in reference to Zeruel's (remember, the 10th Angel of NTE is not actually called Zeruel as far as we know) own body markings. The artist used Eva inspiration for the arms because the alternative is toilet paper.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 21, 2013 2:29 pm Rei IV wrote: Rei's body (figure) sans the plug suit.
